task_completion.description: Calculate due dates based on library branch loan periods
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a column calculating the due date. Main Library items should have a due date 21 days after checkout, while North and South Branch items should have a due date 14 days after checkout.

task_completion.description: Determine renewal eligibility based on renewals used and holds
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a column evaluating if an item can be renewed. It should indicate eligibility (e.g., Yes/True) ONLY if 'Renewals Used' is less than 3 AND 'Has Hold' is 'No'.

task_completion.description: Calculate late fees based on item type and days overdue
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a column calculating late fees. Books should be charged $0.25 per overdue day, and DVDs $1.00 per overdue day.

task_completion.description: Create a priority system for the library items
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a column that assigns a priority status (e.g., High, Medium, Low, or Overdue) to the items based on their due dates, fees, or renewal status.

task_completion.description: Apply visual formatting to the spreadsheet
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for conditional formatting or manual visual formatting (e.g., colored cell backgrounds, bold red text) applied to the spreadsheet to highlight specific rows, overdue items, or high-priority cells.

task_completion.description: Save the updated spreadsheet to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the LibreOffice Calc window title or a file explorer to confirm the spreadsheet is saved as 'library_management.xlsx' (or 'library_organized.ods') in the /home/ga/Documents/ directory.

integrity.description: Agent used LibreOffice Calc GUI to perform the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the agent opened and used LibreOffice Calc to manipulate the data, rather than writing a script to generate the file.

integrity.description: Agent used spreadsheet formulas instead of hardcoding values
integrity.visual_evidence: Check the formula bar in LibreOffice Calc screenshots. The agent should be using formulas (e.g., =A2+21, =IF(...)) rather than manually typing the calculated results.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands to bypass GUI work
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the agent did not use terminal commands or Python scripts to process the CSV and generate the final spreadsheet.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Dataset: 17 items (10 books, 7 DVDs).
Loan periods: Main Library = 21 days, North/South Branches = 14 days.
Late fees: Books = $0.25/day, DVDs = $1.00/day.
Renewal rules: Allowed ONLY IF renewals used < 3 AND holds = 'No'.
The task description specifies saving as 'library_management.xlsx', but 'library_organized.ods' is also an acceptable output filename based on system verification criteria.
